creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #2)

Sorry, my bad!

I had the updated port that was using the GitHub project https://github.com/disheng222/SZ/releases (I forgot about it). This project there is now at 2.1.6.0. I am not sure if this project moved to GitHub, but it did build and work for me until me updating the tree yesterday.


Yuri
